name: Invoca Call Tracking & Conversation Intelligence API
what_it_does: Invoca REST API for AI-powered call tracking and conversation intelligence platform. Enables AI agents to manage phone call attribution tracking linking phone calls to marketing campaigns and digital ad clicks, handle conversation intelligence data including AI-extracted call outcome, buyer intent, and lead quality scoring, access call routing and dynamic number insertion (DNI) configuration for marketing attribution, retrieve caller data and geographic analytics for audience intelligence, handle conversation transcript and keyword spotting data for compliance and quality assurance, access revenue attribution data linking calls to closed deals for marketing ROI measurement, retrieve agent performance data from AI call scoring for sales coaching, manage integration data with Google Ads, Meta, Salesforce, and marketing platforms, handle appointment booking and scheduled callback data for lead management, and integrate call intelligence data with CRM, marketing automation, and analytics platforms.
use_cases: Attributing revenue to marketing campaigns from phone call analytics agents
Scoring call quality from conversation intelligence agents
Routing callers from AI-powered call distribution agents
Coaching sales agents from conversation intelligence agents
not_for: Contact center operations without marketing attribution focus
Simple call tracking without AI conversation intelligence
Consumer calling apps without enterprise marketing attribution context
best_when: A digital marketing team, automotive dealer, healthcare system, or financial services organization using Invoca wants AI agents to automate call attribution, conversation quality scoring, lead routing, sales coaching, and marketing ROI reporting from phone interactions.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Call recording and transcription for conversation intelligence requires two-party consent in many US states and GDPR consent in EU — automated recording without jurisdiction-specific consent disclosure creates wiretapping liability. HIPAA applies to healthcare call transcription with PHI; automated call analytics in healthcare must comply with HIPAA. TCPA applies to outbound marketing calls; automated dialing campaigns must validate DNC registry and prior consent.

auth.notes: Invoca uses API key and OAuth 2.0 authentication. Developer portal at developer.invoca.net. Santa Barbara, California HQ. VC-backed ($116M raised, Silver Lake Waterman, Salesforce Ventures). Invoca Signal AI is the conversation analytics engine. Strong in automotive, healthcare, and financial services. Google Ads and Meta certified partner for call measurement. Competes with CallRail and Marchex for call tracking market.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by call volume and feature tier
pricing.notes: Santa Barbara, California. Founded 2008. VC-backed: Silver Lake Waterman, Salesforce Ventures ($116M+ raised). Invoca Signal AI for conversation intelligence. Google Ads and Meta certified partner. Strong in automotive dealerships, healthcare call tracking, and financial services. Competes with CallRail (SMB focus), Marchex (enterprise), and DialogTech for call tracking.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; volume plan dependent

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Call recording/transcription requires two-party consent in CA, FL, NY, and 8 other US states; automated recording without pre-call consent disclosure creates criminal wiretapping liability
HIPAA healthcare calls — healthcare call transcription may contain PHI (symptoms, medications, appointments); automated processing requires HIPAA BAA with Invoca and compliant data handling
TCPA marketing calls — automated outbound calls and texts to US cell phones require prior express written consent under TCPA; DNC registry compliance required for telemarketing
Dynamic number insertion (DNI) JavaScript — Invoca DNI uses JavaScript-based number swapping for attribution; server-side or API-only call tracking requires different configuration
Signal AI accuracy — Invoca AI conversation scoring is probabilistic; automated CRM updates or lead qualification based solely on Signal scores require human review for high-stakes decisions
Multi-touch attribution limitations — call attribution reflects last-click or configured attribution model; marketing mix modeling requires additional analytics beyond Invoca data
agent_readiness.security_notes: Call tracking and analytics. SOC2, HIPAA. API key/OAuth2. US. Call recording, transcription, and marketing attribution data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Call intelligence. SOC2, HIPAA. API key/OAuth2. US. Call recording and marketing attribution data.
